info.description: One entry per weekly Returning Circle. Each recording is sold as a one-off (default £10). Buyers see it inside their members area after login.

title.description: Human label for this week's Circle. Buyers see this in their library. Example: 'Tuesday 15 July 2026 Circle'.

session_date.description: Date the Circle happened. Used to sort the library (most recent first) and shown next to each entry.

youtube_url.description: The UNLISTED YouTube URL. Buyers click through from their library. Format: https://youtu.be/xxxxx

price_gbp.description: Price in whole GBP (default 10). Only relevant while this recording is 'available for purchase'.

is_available_for_purchase.description: Tick to make THIS recording the one people can buy on /community/the-returning-circle. Untick after the next week's recording is up so buyers only ever see the most recent option on sale. Existing buyers keep access forever regardless.

description.description: Optional short description shown on the library card (e.g. 'Guest facilitator, 90 min'). Leave blank for most weeks.

notes_for_anna.description: Private notes — not shown anywhere on the site. Use this to jot who attended, what came up, etc.

buyers.description: Auto-populated when someone pays £10 for this recording. You can also manually add a buyer here if someone paid you outside the site (bank transfer, in person, etc.) — they'll see it in their library once they log in.
